goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should go to 'london liverpool street' and should 'leave after 16:00'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should be in the 'east'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'star of the hotel', and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should go to london liverpool street and should leave after 16:00
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the cheap price range
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the east
Make sure you get phone number, star of the hotel, and postcode
